session_id: operator-dispatched (nq build push); governor microslice+repair autonomy within Phase-2/TLS
class: Microslice + repair autonomy (operator-granted). Operator directed slice 2d-a (manual persisted receipt series) and explicitly DEFERRED scheduling/operationalization to a later slice (2d-b) — a larger authority step not taken here.
slice: Slice 2d-a — smallest append-only receipt-series sink for TLS probe outputs. Give the witness a notebook, not an alarm clock: manual collection only, no scheduler, no DB.
preceded_by: Continuation after 2c (f87ee68, webpki validation) verified green.

what_executed.series_sink: crates/nq-monitor/src/tls_cert_series.rs (new): persist_receipt(base, receipt) -> base/<YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ>/<host_slug>.json. Append-only: refuses to overwrite an existing file (no datapoint silently clobbered). Timestamped individual files (NOT JSONL) — easier to inspect, one malformed receipt does not poison the rest. run_stamp compresses RFC3339 to second granularity; host_slug makes host:port filename-safe.
what_executed.cli: probe tls-cert --out-dir <dir> (optional). stdout still prints the receipt unchanged; when --out-dir is set, the receipt is ALSO appended to the series and the path is echoed to stderr (stdout stays clean JSON).
what_executed.gitignore: /runs/ added to .gitignore — generated time-series receipts are NOT version-controlled (the repo is not a cert-aging scrapbook). A specimen receipt may be committed deliberately later; never the whole diary.
what_executed.tests: 4 deterministic offline tests: run_stamp compression (with/without subsecond), host_slug filename-safety, persist writes the timestamped path with content, and append-only REFUSES overwrite. No network, no DB.

manual_capture_at_review.captured: runs/tls-cert-probe/20260619T235552Z/{nq.neutral.zone_443.json, labelwatch.neutral.zone_443.json} — both verdict=valid_at_probe_time, validation_result=valid, days_remaining 70 / 36. (Both landed in one run dir because probed within the same second.)
manual_capture_at_review.append_only_proof: Re-probing nq.neutral.zone in the same second -> exit 1, stderr 'append-only' — the existing receipt was NOT overwritten.
manual_capture_at_review.gitignore_proof: git check-ignore runs/tls-cert-probe -> IGNORED. The captured receipts are NOT in the commit.
manual_capture_at_review.note: MANUAL collection. The operator ran the probe by hand. No cadence, no runner, no completeness claim.
